chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S- 423 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA 9970/2025. 2. For orders on MA 9971/2025. 18.11.2025. Mr. Shahid Mirbahar, Advocate for applicant / surety. = 1. Urgency granted. 2. Through this application, applicant seeks release of surety furnished in the present matter. Learned counsel for the applicant states that vide Order dated 03.05.2023 the applicants/accused Kashif and others were granted protective bail by this Court for a period of Seven days and the required surety was duly submitted by the present applicant/surety. He further states that thereafter accused surrendered before the trial Court within stipulated period where they were granted bail, as such surety furnished before this Court is no more required. In view of above, listed application stands disposed of with direction to the office to release/return the surety to applicant/surety, however, after due verification and identification as per procedure. JUDGE Tufail
